name: Blend Labs Digital Lending REST API
what_it_does: Blend Labs digital lending REST API for banks, credit unions, and mortgage lenders to digitize the mortgage, home equity, personal loan, auto loan, and deposit account opening experience — enabling automated loan application orchestration, borrower data collection, document upload, income verification, and decisioning workflow management through Blend's cloud-based digital lending platform. Enables AI agents to manage loan applications for mortgage and consumer loan application workflow automation, handle borrower experience for guided application question flow automation, access document management for borrower document upload and verification automation, retrieve income verification for digital income and employment verification automation, manage condition management for loan condition tracking and fulfillment automation, handle closing workflow for digital closing and eSign automation, access pre-approval for automated pre-approval letter generation automation, retrieve pipeline management for loan officer pipeline and status automation, manage co-borrower for joint application and coborrower workflow automation, and integrate Blend with LOS (Encompass, Byte), CRM, and credit bureau systems for end-to-end digital mortgage automation.
use_cases: Digitizing mortgage loan applications with guided borrower experience for lending automation agents
Automating income and employment verification during loan origination for digital mortgage automation agents
Managing loan condition collection and borrower document requests for loan processing automation agents
Orchestrating digital closing and eSign workflows for mortgage closing automation agents
not_for: Loan servicing (Blend is loan origination, not payment processing or loan servicing)
Commercial real estate lending (Blend focuses on consumer mortgage and retail banking products)
Direct consumer lending without lender relationship (Blend is B2B platform for banks/lenders, not consumer app)
best_when: A bank, credit union, or mortgage lender wanting AI agents to orchestrate digital mortgage and consumer loan applications, automate borrower document collection, verify income digitally, and manage loan pipeline through Blend's digital lending platform.
avoid_when: LENDER RELATIONSHIP REQUIRED: Blend is B2B platform for banks and lenders; automated consumer access assumption creates lender_required; automated must be licensed lender using Blend platform. LOS INTEGRATION REQUIRED: Blend integrates with loan origination systems (Encompass, BytePro); automated standalone assumption creates LOS_not_connected without LOS integration; automated must configure LOS connection for full workflow. REGULATORY COMPLIANCE IS LENDER RESPONSIBILITY: Lending regulatory compliance (RESPA, TRID, ECOA) is lender responsibility; automated built-in compliance assumption creates regulatory_risk for compliance gaps; automated must ensure lender compliance team reviews workflows. PRODUCT CONFIGURATION IS LENDER-SPECIFIC: Loan products and questions are configured per lender; automated universal loan assumption creates product_not_configured for products not set up by lender; automated must use lender's configured loan products.

auth.notes: Blend Labs uses OAuth2 for digital lending REST API. REST API with JSON. San Francisco, CA HQ. Founded 2012 by Nima Ghamsari. NYSE:BLND. Products: Mortgage Suite, Consumer Banking Suite (home equity, personal loan, auto, deposit). Processes $300B+ in loan applications annually. 300+ customers (banks, credit unions). Competes with ICE Mortgage Technology, Maxwell, and nCino for digital mortgage and consumer lending.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Demo for qualified lenders; production requires Blend lender agreement
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-application transaction pricing; enterprise platform subscription; product-specific pricing by loan type
pricing.notes: San Francisco CA. NYSE:BLND. Per-application pricing. 300+ bank/credit union customers. $300B+ loans processed.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth token; application and document APIs throttled per lender plan

known_agent_gotchas: LOAN APPLICATION IS STATEFUL: Blend loan applications follow a defined state machine; automated arbitrary-update assumption creates invalid_state_transition for updates to applications not in correct state; automated must track and respect application state machine

WEBHOOK EVENTS DRIVE WORKFLOW: Blend workflows are event-driven via webhooks; automated polling assumption creates delayed_response; automated must implement webhook handlers for application status changes

DOCUMENT REQUESTS ARE CONDITION-BASED: Document collection is tied to loan conditions; automated generic-upload assumption creates orphaned_document for documents not linked to conditions; automated must associate documents with specific loan conditions

INCOME VERIFICATION INTEGRATIONS VARY: Digital income verification providers vary by lender configuration; automated uniform-income assumption creates provider_not_configured for lenders with different income verification setups; automated must use lender's configured verification provider

BORROWER CONSENT IS REQUIRED: Blend requires explicit borrower consent before pulling credit or income data; automated auto-pull assumption creates consent_violation; automated must ensure borrower consent is captured before third-party data pulls
agent_readiness.security_notes: Digital lending. SOC2, PCI-DSS, GLBA. OAuth2. US only. Mortgage application, income, and financial data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Mortgage lending. SOC2, GLBA, PCI-DSS. OAuth2. US. Borrower financial and PII data.
